reply.text: Im pressing formal charges you just broke three of my brain cells

messages.text: they already at the scene, mirror gave a statement
innocent people dont arch near stainless steel doors
stainless steel saw too much, it traumatised quietly 😳
my brain cells joined a support group after that post
tell them thanks for their service and sacrifice
i clicked knowing the risks, thats on me
yeah, you signed the terms with one thirsty tap
i showed my friends before i even replied
mhm, real scientist, zooming in for data collection
gotta analyze those dangerous door handle angles
blame the door, it curved first actually
